svg.title: Enhanced multi-agent pipeline for Egyptian criminal cases
svg.desc: Nine agents with conditional branching: DataIngestion → ProceduralAuditor (with early-exit branch) → LegalResearcher → parallel EvidenceAnalyst+ConfessionValidity+WitnessCredibility → ProsecutionAnalyst → DefenseAnalyst → SentencingAgent → Judge

g.text: Builds النيابة theory, links evidence to charges
